import React,{useEffect}from'react';import{useNotes}from'../../context/NotesContext';import ExportButton from'./ExportButton';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const TopBar=_ref=>{let{note,onBack}=_ref;const{updateCurrentNoteLocally,saveCurrentNote,deleteCurrentNote}=useNotes();const handleSave=async()=>{if(note){try{await saveCurrentNote();}catch(error){console.error('Failed to save note:',error);}}};const handleDelete=async()=>{if(note&&window.confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this note?')){try{await deleteCurrentNote(note.id);}catch(error){console.error('Failed to delete note:',error);}}};const handleTitleChange=title=>{if(note){updateCurrentNoteLocally({title});}};// Add keyboard shortcut for Ctrl+S
useEffect(()=>{const handleKeyDown=e=>{if((e.ctrlKey||e.metaKey)&&e.key==='s'){e.preventDefault();handleSave();}};document.addEventListener('keydown',handleKeyDown);return()=>{document.removeEventListener('keydown',handleKeyDown);};},[note,handleSave]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"top-bar",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"top-bar__left",children:[onBack&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"top-bar__btn top-bar__btn--back",onClick:onBack,title:"Back to notes",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"back-icon",children:"<"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",className:"top-bar__title",value:(note===null||note===void 0?void 0:note.title)||'',onChange:e=>handleTitleChange(e.target.value),placeholder:"Note title..."})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"top-bar__right",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"top-bar__btn top-bar__btn--delete",onClick:handleDelete,disabled:!note,title:"Delete note",children:"\uD83D\uDDD1\uFE0F"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"top-bar__btn top-bar__btn--save",onClick:handleSave,disabled:!note,title:"Save note (Ctrl+S)",children:"Save"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ExportButton,{note:note})]})]});};export default TopBar;
